hero.subtitle: Discover refined living that blends Japanese Zen spirit with the biophilic breath of the sea.

rooms.title: A Space Made For You

items.name: Deluxe Garden Villa
items.desc: Facing the tropical garden, minimalist interiors, quiet and private.

items.name: Ocean Master Suite
items.desc: Direct ocean view, open-air soaking tub, wake up to sunrise from bed.

items.quote: A truly healing space. I got a remarkable amount of work done and spent quiet afternoons by the infinity pool. I will definitely be back!
items.name: Hoang Anh

items.quote: The architecture here is stunning, every corner is photo-worthy. The service was attentive and the ocean view from the bedroom is unmatched.
items.name: Linh Mai

items.quote: My spouse and I had a wonderful stay in the Grand Suite. The privacy and professional service made us very happy.
items.name: Tran Quan
